title: Crimea: Drone strike
title_en: Crimea: Drone strike

description: Ukrainian drones hit gas storage facility in occupied Crimea, footage shows, power plant reportedly struck. Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces (USF) continued their drone campaign over occupied Crimea on June 19 and overnight into June 20, striking energy facilites on the peninsula, Ukrainian officials and Russian Telegram media channels reported.

description: Polish president strips Zelensky of honorary title over military unit controversy, as Kyiv calls decision 'strategic mistake.' Polish President Karol Nawrocki stripped President Volodymyr Zelensky of the country's honorary Order of the White Eagle title on June 19 following public outcry over Zelensky's decision to name a serving Ukrainian military unit after the Ukrainian Insurgent Army (UPA).
description_en: Polish president strips Zelensky of honorary title over military unit controversy, as Kyiv calls decision 'strategic mistake.' title: Kyiv: Drone strike
title_en: Kyiv: Drone strike
title_uk: Київ: Дрон-удар
description: 'A week will be enough' — Zelensky issues ultimatum to Lukashenko over drone-guidance equipment. President Volodymyr Zelensky on June 19 accused Belarus of facilitating Russian drone attacks on Ukraine and warned that Minsk has one week to remove communications equipment allegedly helping guide strikes from Belarusian territory, or Ukraine would take action itself.
description_en: 'A week will be enough' — Zelensky issues ultimatum to Lukashenko over drone-guidance equipment. title: Casualties reported
title_en: Casualties reported
title_uk: Повідомляється про постраждалих
description: Regarding Belarus. When full-scale war broke out, we were attacked by rockets that killed children and adults. And Oleksandr Lukashenko knows it. A large number of missiles flew from Belarus. Then he called, apologized and said he had no control over it. I don't believe it, but he already talked about it. Now Russia will continue to push him into this war. Now he understands that Ukraine will be responsible. No need for extra...
description_en: Regarding Belarus. When full-scale war broke out, we were attacked by rockets that killed children and adults. And Oleksandr Lukashenko knows it. A large number of missiles flew from Belarus. Then he called, apologized and said he had no control over it. I don't believe it, but he already talked about it. Now Russia will continue to push him into this war. Now he understands that Ukraine will be responsible. No need for extra...
description_uk: Щодо Білорусі. Коли почалася повномасштабна війна, нас атакували ракети, які вбивали дітей і дорослих. І Олександр Лукашенко це знає. Велика кількість ракет летіла з Білорусі. Тоді він дзвонив, вибачався і казав, що це не контролював. Я в це не вірю, але він про це вже говорив. Зараз Росія буде його продовжувати штовхати в цю війну. Зараз він розуміє, що Україна буде відповідати. Не треба зайвих...

description: Honduran President Nasri Asfura began his first visit to Ukraine by commemorating fallen Ukrainian soldiers. This is an important gesture of respect for our people who gave their lives for Ukraine, for freedom and peace. We appreciate such support, solidarity with our people and understanding of what Ukraine is going through today. Eternal memory and gratitude to all our defenders who died...

This is an important gesture of respect for our people who gave their lives for Ukraine, for freedom and peace. We appreciate such support, solidarity with our people and understanding of what Ukraine is going through today. Eternal memory and gratitude to all our defenders who died...

Це важливий жест поваги до наших людей, які віддали життя за Україну, за свободу та мир. Цінуємо таку підтримку, солідарність із нашим народом і розуміння того, через що сьогодні проходить Україна. description: Why Ukraine’s nuclear corruption cleanup is taking so long Kyiv vowed to clean up corruption at Ukraine’s troubled state-run nuclear company, but seven months after the country’s most significant wartime corruption scandal, the old system remains largely intact. Energoatom, which operates three working nuclear plants that generate more than 60% of Ukraine’s electricity, became the poster child...

title: Odesa: 90 drones launched
title_en: Odesa: 90 drones launched
title_uk: Одеса: запущено 90 дронів
description: 11 killed, 63 injured in Russian strikes across Ukraine over past day as drones target foreign ships in Odesa Oblast. Ukraine’s Air Force said Russia launched 90 Shahed-type attack drones overnight on June 19. Air defenses downed 79 drones, while nine hit targets across eight locations.
description_en: 11 killed, 63 injured in Russian strikes across Ukraine over past day as drones target foreign ships in Odesa Oblast. Ukraine’s Air Force said Russia launched 90 Shahed-type attack drones overnight on June 19. Air defenses downed 79 drones, while nine hit targets across eight locations.
